title: Maxime Stefani

{{short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=October 2024}} {{Infobox rugby league biography | name = Maxime Stefani | fullname = Maxime Stefani | nickname = | image = Maxime Stefani & Benjamin Laguerre.jpg | image_size = | birth_date = {{Birth date and age|1998|03|10|df=y}} | birth_place = [[Saint-Gaudens, Haute-Garonne|Saint-Gaudens]], Haute-Garonne,
Occitania, France | height = {{convert|1.82|m|ftin|abbr=on|order=flip}} | weight = {{convert|94|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} | position = {{rlp|SR}} | club1 = {{nowrap|[[Saint-Gaudens Bears]]}} | year1start = 2016 | year1end = 21 | appearances1 = 80 | tries1 = 31 | goals1 = 0 | fieldgoals1 = 0 | points1 = 124 | club2 = [[Toulouse Olympique]] | year2start = 2022 | year2end = present | appearances2 = 72 | tries2 = 32 | goals2 = 0 | fieldgoals2 = 0 | points2 = 128 | teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France B]] | yearAstart = 2022 | yearAend = present | appearancesA = 1 | triesA = 0 | goalsA = 0 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 0 | teamB = [[France national rugby league team|France]] | yearBstart = 2022 | yearBend = present | appearancesB = 2 | triesB = 0 | goalsB = 0 | fieldgoalsB = 0 | pointsB = 0 | new = yes | source = [https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/maxime-stefani/summary.html Rugby League Project][https://www.itsrugby.co.uk/players/maxime-stefani-39036.html itsrugby profile]{{Rugby league records|title=Maxime Stefani|id=10559}} | updated = 27 October 2024 }} '''Maxime Stefani''' (born 10 March 1998) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr}} forward for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He previously played for the [[Saint-Gaudens Bears]].[https://treizemondial.fr/maxime-stefani-quitte-saint-gaudens-mais-reste-en-elite-1/ ''Maxime Stefani quitte Saint-Gaudens mais reste en Élite 1''], treizemondial.fr, le 24 juillet 221. In February 2022 Stefani made his [[Toulouse Olympique|Toulouse]] début in the [[Super League]] against the [[Warrington Wolves]], scoring a try on debut.{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/60538888|title=Super League: Toulouse 18-32 Warrington - Wire's six tries beat improving French|website=bbc.co.uk|access-date=2022-02-26}}[https://treizemondial.fr/maxime-stefani-la-surprise-du-chef/ ''Maxime Stefani, la surprise du chef''], treizemondial.fr, le 27 février 2022.[https://www.midi-olympique.fr/2022/02/27/super-league-le-meilleur-est-a-venir-pour-le-toulouse-olympique-xiii-10138619.php ''Super League - Le meilleur est à venir pour le Toulouse olympique XIII''], midi-olympique.fr, lundi 28 février 2022, Didier Navarre. In October 2022 he was named in the [[2021 Men's Rugby League World Cup squads#France|France squad]] for the [[2021 Rugby League World Cup]].[https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/rugby-league-world-cup-2021-squad-lists/ Full list of every squad at the Rugby League World Cup 2021] His younger brother, Mattéo, has also played rugby league for Toulouse.{{cite web |last1=Brady |first1=Steve |title=It’s tough to make it to the top in rugby league, particularly in France where rugby union is so strong. So what makes a young French player choose the path towards a professional contract? |url=https://www.totalrl.com/its-tough-to-make-it-to-the-top-in-rugby-league-particularly-in-france-where-rugby-union-is-so-strong-so-what-makes-a-young-french-player-choose-the-path-towards-a-professional-contract/ |website=Total Rugby League |access-date=23 April 2024 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20240126121819/https://www.totalrl.com/its-tough-to-make-it-to-the-top-in-rugby-league-particularly-in-france-where-rugby-union-is-so-strong-so-what-makes-a-young-french-player-choose-the-path-towards-a-professional-contract/ |archive-date=26 January 2024 |date=12 September 2023}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[https://www.to13.com/joueur/stefani-maxime/ Toulouse Olympique profile] *[https://www.superleague.co.uk/player/1422/maxime-stefani SL profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/maxime-stefani/ France profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/maxime-stefani/ French profile] {{Toulouse Olympique squad}} {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Stefani, Maxime}} [[Category:1998 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Occitania (administrative region)]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Saint-Gaudens Bears players]] [[Category:Sportspeople from Haute-Garonne]] [[Category:Toulouse Olympique players]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]]
